mainEntity.name: Nationwide, is AI use in legal services regulated yet?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ethics rules, not full regs yet.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Ethics opinions guide: verify, confidential, disclose.[3] State-by-state, no uniform law.[5] Key factors: Unauthorized practice risks; access initiatives grow.[2][6] Stay updated via bar associations. Lawyer oversight essential.
